creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 187834
Proposed patch (since 450351 revision)

Patch to update audio/pulseaudio port from 11.0 to 11.1 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/pulseaudio/pulseaudio/compare/v11.0...v11.1
https://lists.freedesktop.org/archives/pulseaudio-discuss/2017-September/028733.html

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.3 amd64.
